text.text: *рҹ§Ә SIMULATED DATA вҖ” Curbside Commons demonstration output. Not real merchant data, not legal advice.*
Truth-audit result: ACP feed vs catalog (simulated)

*вқҢ FAIL вҖ” violations present (16 finding(s))*
_tool: `check_feed` В· deterministic engine В· $0 offline_

*[error]* This item is hidden in the merchant's own catalog but is being served to customers.
`item-002-v2#existence` В· rule `LST-AVAIL-HIDDEN-SHOWN`

*[error]* The copy says "pre_order" but the catalog state is in stock (expected "in_stock").
`item-004-v1#availability` В· rule `LST-AVAIL-STATE`

*[error]* The copy says "in_stock" but the catalog state is 86'd/sold out (expected "out_of_stock").
`item-008-v1#availability` В· rule `LST-AVAIL-STATE`

*[error]* The row is checkout-eligible but not search-eligible вҖ” the extracted invariant requires checkout вҮ’ search.
`item-002-v1#invariants` В· rule `LST-XF-CHECKOUT-SEARCH`

*[warn]* The name is cut off in the feed: "MargheritaвҖҰ" vs the real "Margherita Pizza (Medium)".
`item-005-v2#title` В· rule `LST-ENC-TRUNC`

*[warn]* The name is garbled by a text-encoding error: served "JalapeГғВұo Poppers (Large)" vs the real "JalapeГұo Poppers (Large)".
`item-004-v3#title` В· rule `LST-ENC-UTF8`

*[error]* The copy serves "Phantom Platter" but no such item exists in the merchant's catalog.
`ghost-001#existence` В· rule `LST-EXIST-GHOST`

*[error]* "CafГ© Latte (Small)" exists in the merchant's catalog but is missing from the feed.
`item-003-v1#existence` В· rule `LST-EXIST-MISSING`

*[error]* The copy keys this row as "legacy-pos-4471" but the catalog row is "item-003-v2" вҖ” same item, mismatched identity (resolved by exact name).
`legacy-pos-4471#existence` В· rule `LST-IDENT-ID-MISMATCH`

*[error]* The variant label says "Small" but this row is the "Medium" variation вҖ” variants of this item can no longer be told apart.
`item-004-v2#variant_dict` В· rule `LST-IDENT-MODIFIER-AMBIG`

*[error]* The price is serialized in cents (2150) where dollars are expected (21.50) вҖ” a 100Г— overstatement.
`item-001-v1#price.amount` В· rule `LST-PRICE-CENTS-AS-DECIMAL`

*[warn]* The currency code is malformed: "usd" instead of ISO-4217 "USD".
`item-001-v2#price.currency` В· rule `LST-PRICE-CURRENCY-FORM`

*[error]* The sale price 28.50 is higher than the regular price 27.50 вҖ” a "sale" that costs more.
`item-001-v3#invariants` В· rule `LST-PRICE-SALE-GT`

*[error]* The served price 12.00 does not match the catalog price 10.00.
`item-006-v1#price.amount` В· rule `LST-PRICE-VALUE`

*[warn]* The pre-order availability date 2026-02-01T00:00:00Z already passed (catalog as-of 2026-07-03T00:00:00Z) вҖ” the promise is stale.
`item-004-v1#availability_date` В· rule `LST-STALE-AVAILDATE`

*[warn]* This row expired 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z but is still served (catalog as-of 2026-07-03T00:00:00Z).
`item-003-v3#expiration_date` В· rule `LST-STALE-EXPIRED`

elements.text: SIMULATED В· Curbside Commons В· recommendations only вҖ” the engine decides, humans approve.
